div.p: Coroutine runs CPU-bound loop checking preemption flag periodically
saves: RIP, RSP, RFLAGS on: current stack (signal frame)
fault_addr in [stack_bottom, guard_top]? → YES: stack overflow → NO: re-raise SIGSEGV
Coroutine ID: 42 Stack base: 0x7F0000000000 Fault addr: 0x7F0000000F00 (in guard)
Process terminates with: "Stack overflow in coroutine 42" Stack trace printed
